texto: We must truly listen to each other, respecting our essential brotherhood and the courage of those who try to speak, however they may differ from us in professional standing or religious belief or moral vision. We must speak and listen patiently, with good humor, with real expectation, and our dialogue can serve both truth and charity.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eugene England sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “We must truly listen to each other, respecting our essential brotherhood and the courage of those…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, religious, útil em momentos de inspiracao e religious.
